content.speakerText: Thanks for letting me take the day off.

options.text: No problem, have a good one!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'No problem, have a good one!' 是礼貌道别时的自然回应，既表达理解又传递友好祝愿。选项2是回应任务的语句，不适用于感谢场景；选项3是拒绝性回应，不合礼仪；选项4虽然语法正确，但 'see you tomorrow' 与请假语境冲突（对方是请假，非第二天上班）。

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you covering my shift.

options.text: Can you pay me back later?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Don't mention it. Take care!' 是标准、礼貌的道别回应，体现谦逊与关怀。选项2语气冷漠，不专业；选项3暗示被迫帮忙，负面情绪；选项4涉及金钱，严重破坏职场礼貌氛围。

content.speakerText: Thanks for your help with the presentation.

options.text: My pleasure. Have a great afternoon!
It was easy, no big deal.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'My pleasure. Have a great afternoon!' 是职场中优雅得体的回应，既表达乐意帮忙，又送上美好祝愿。选项2虽口语化但贬低了对方的感谢，显得轻率；选项3和4都带有索取或冷漠语气，不符合礼貌道别原则。

content.template: Thanks for letting me take the day off. ___ have a good one!
content.hint: 回应感谢时最自然的开场表达
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌回应感谢的固定搭配（No problem, You're welcome）

content.template: I really appreciate your support. ___ you next week!
content.hint: 道别时常用的未来再见表达

content.template: Thanks for covering my shift. ___ it! Have a nice evening.
content.hint: 简洁表达感谢的常用动词

content.speakerText: Thanks for letting me take the day off.
expectedAnswers: No problem, have a good one!
You're welcome! Hope you get some rest.
Appreciate it. See you on Thursday!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否恰当回应感谢并表达友好道别
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：使用地道口语表达，非机械背诵
关键词覆盖：包含感谢回应词（No problem / You're welcome）和道别语（see you / have a good one）

content.speakerText: I really appreciate you helping me with the client report.
content.speakerTextCn: 非常感谢你帮我处理客户报告。
expectedAnswers: My pleasure! Let me know if you need anything else.
Glad I could help. Have a great day!
Thanks for saying that — I really appreciate it too!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达感激并维持积极互动
语言准确性：使用正确时态和搭配，如 'glad I could help'
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合职场口语习惯
关键词覆盖：包含感谢回应词（my pleasure / glad to help）和结束语（have a great day）

content.speakerText: Thanks for staying late to finish the project.
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你留下来完成项目。
expectedAnswers: It was nothing — we're a team. Thanks for your hard work too!
No worries! Hope you get to relax this weekend.
Appreciate your dedication. See you Monday!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否既回应感谢又表达认可与关怀
语言准确性：使用恰当的连接词和礼貌结构
表达自然度：语调自然，符合职场同事间对话风格
关键词覆盖：包含感谢回应词（it was nothing / no worries）和道别/关怀语（see you Monday / relax this weekend）
